name: Hazard & Prohibition Sign Set
shortDescription: Statutory warning, prohibition and mandatory-action signage pack.
longDescription: A consolidated pack covering the mandatory, prohibition and warning signage most industrial sites are required to display — no smoking, no open flame, flammable material, PPE required, and electrical hazard warnings. Supplied as a set to simplify a full-site signage audit and rollout.

images.alt: Hazard & Prohibition Sign Set supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
